_metadata.description: Accessibility overlays and web-governance/QA tools. Signatures data-mined from the HTML of BuiltWith-labeled sites (UNI-141): scripts patterns match the vendor's loader host, deduced empirically (not hand-guessed). Overlays (UserWay/accessiBe) are candidate NEGATIVE signals — presence is a risk flag, not a plus (UNI-137).
_metadata.source: data-mined from Supabase scan_pages.content vs BuiltWith labels (deduce->validate harness)

UserWay.description: UserWay accessibility overlay widget, injected via cdn.userway.org. Accessibility overlays are widely regarded as not delivering real WCAG compliance and are frequent ADA-lawsuit targets — treat presence as a risk signal (UNI-137).

accessiBe.description: accessiBe accessibility overlay, loaded from acsbapp.com / accessibe.com. Overlay — candidate negative signal (UNI-137).

Monsido.description: Monsido web accessibility + quality-assurance monitoring, loaded from app-script.monsido.com.

Siteimprove.description: Siteimprove accessibility / SEO / quality-assurance governance platform; the analytics beacon loads from siteimproveanalytics.com.
